parameters.query: SELECT token, tenant_id, business_id FROM table_1 column_1 $1 column_2 now() LIMIT 1

SELECT id::text, product_name, display_name, minio_url, price,
  COALESCE(show_on_store, true) AS show_on_store, image_type, sort_order
FROM table_2
column_3 $1::uuid column_4 $2::uuid
  AND COALESCE(image_type, 'product') = 'product'
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
